# Yenasoy

> Yenasoy is an industrial automation services company based in Uzbekistan, providing PLC programming, HMI development, SCADA integration, and technical support for manufacturing production lines.
>
> Yenasoy — компания по промышленной автоматизации в Узбекистане, предоставляющая услуги программирования ПЛК, разработки ЧМИ, интеграции SCADA и технической поддержки производственных линий.
>
> Yenasoy — O'zbekistondagi sanoat avtomatlashtirish xizmatlari kompaniyasi, PLC dasturlash, HMI ishlab chiqish, SCADA integratsiyasi va ishlab chiqarish liniyalari uchun texnik yordam ko'rsatadi.

## Company Overview / О компании / Kompaniya haqida

Yenasoy specializes in automation solutions for manufacturing enterprises of any scale in Uzbekistan and the surrounding region.

**Services / Услуги / Xizmatlar:**

- **PLC Programming / Программирование ПЛК / PLC dasturlash** — Control logic design and implementation for industrial automation systems
- **HMI Development / Разработка ЧМИ / HMI ishlab chiqish** — Operator interfaces and visualization systems for production monitoring
- **SCADA & VFD Integration / Интеграция SCADA и ЧРП / SCADA va VFD integratsiyasi** — Supervisory control systems and variable frequency drive integration
- **Diagnostics & Support / Диагностика и поддержка / Diagnostika va qo'llab-quvvatlash** — Remote and on-site troubleshooting and technical assistance

## Service Categories / Категории услуг / Xizmat turlari

### 1. Reactive/Emergency Support
- Remote Diagnostics and Troubleshooting
- Remote Recovery and System Restart
- On-Site Diagnostics
- Emergency On-Site Recovery

### 2. Planned Engineering Projects
- Minor PLC Modifications
- Standard PLC Modifications
- HMI Modifications and Upgrades

### 3. New Automation Development
- New PLC Program Development
- PLC + HMI Package Solutions
- Full Production Line Software Packages

### 4. Documentation & System Handover
- Complete Documentation Packages
- Access Transfer and Maintenance Handover

### 5. Additional Options
- Equipment Integration (Motors, VFDs, Sensors, Pneumatic Actuators, Servo Axes, HMI Screens)
- Advanced Features (External Machine Integration, Recipe Systems, Barcode/Tracking, Advanced Diagnostics, Safety PLC Integration)

## System Complexity Classes / Классы сложности систем / Tizim murakkabligi sinflari

Yenasoy categorizes automation projects by complexity level:

| Class | Line Length | Motors/VFDs | Sensors | Typical Features |
|-------|-------------|-------------|---------|------------------|
| **S (Simple)** | Up to 30m | ≤5 | ≤15 | Basic start/stop, interlocks |
| **M (Medium)** | 30-100m | 6-15 | 16-50 | Multiple conveyor zones, basic HMI |
| **L (Complex)** | 100-200m | 16-40 | 50-120 | Machine integration, accumulation logic |
| **XL (High-Complexity)** | 200m+ | 40+ | 120+ | Multiple integrated machines, tracking, safety systems |

## Target Industries / Целевые отрасли / Maqsadli sohalar

- Food & Beverage Manufacturing
- Packaging Lines
- Conveyor Systems
- General Manufacturing
- Any production facility requiring industrial automation
